payload.label: bed
payload.long_description: Large king-size bed with beige-and-gray horizontal striped duvet and two matching pillows; dark stained wooden headboard is visible but partially cropped at the left edge; mattress and bedding fill the foreground and appear neatly made and close to the camera (≈1.5 m).
